---
title: Hypothesis Testing with z-Scores
subtitle: Practice Problems for PSY 241
author: Guenther, Benjamin A.
project:
  type: website
  output-dir: docs
format: 
  html:
    html-math-method: mathjax
    self-contained-math: false
    embed-resources: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import importlib
import stats_project 
import random

# This is to clear cache and reload after edits to the .py file
importlib.reload(stats_project)
from stats_project import RandomData 
```

# Problem 1

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 1, n = sample_size).z_test()
```

# Problem 2

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 1, n = sample_size).z_test()
```

# Problem 3

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 1, n = sample_size).z_test()
```
